description_long: This object is a cylindrical metal can with a classic red and white label, featuring the iconic Campbell's branding. The upper section of the label is red with white script and gold medallion graphics, while the lower section is white with black text and a gold band. The label includes the words 'Chicken Noodle Soup' in bold, with the Campbell's logo prominently displayed. The can has a sealed, slightly recessed metal lid and a crimped bottom edge. The surface is slightly reflective, and the label appears to be printed directly onto the can or on a paper sleeve tightly wrapped around it.
description: A cylindrical Campbell's Chicken Noodle Soup can with a red and white label, gold medallions, and bold branding.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the top and side of the can, with red and white label and gold medallion visible.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting the label's text-heavy section and gold medallion graphics.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the opposite side, with more of the red label and partial Campbell's script visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the Campbell's logo, 'Chicken Noodle Soup' text, and gold medallion clearly.
attribute_brand_logo: A white script 'Campbell's' logo is visible on the front of the can, located in the upper red section, with a cursive font and white color.
attribute_flavor_indication: The words 'Chicken Noodle' are clearly visible on the front label, indicating the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: There is a block of small black text on the lower white section of the label, likely representing nutritional information or ingredients.
